{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Nyron Seven
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Nyron Seven]] is the location where [[Javik]] lives with his family.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c30">''The Captain'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“He retired to live with his family on Nyron Seven.”<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c30" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
